pi_items.source: Verified via scripts/install_astroimagej.sh which downloads WFPC2u5780205r_c0fx.fits directly from fits.gsfc.nasa.gov/samples/
Verified via export_result.sh checking for source_catalog.* in the classification/output directory and task instructions requiring .csv format.
Verified via export_result.sh which explicitly parses this exact file path for the required report fields.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real astronomical data, specifically an HST WFPC2 sample downloaded directly from NASA GSFC (fits.gsfc.nasa.gov). The evaluation script (export_result.sh) correctly verifies the expected catalog at /home/ga/AstroImages/classification/output/source_catalog.csv and parses the required report from /home/ga/AstroImages/classification/output/classification_report.txt exactly as specified in the metadata.
